Download this free 3D print file designed by OutLawPickle. The OpenMANET Raspberry Pi Wi-Fi HaLow MANET Radio is an open-source, field-ready mobile ad-hoc network (MANET) node built on Wi-Fi HaLow (IEEE 802.11ah) technology.Bill of Materials (BOM)Raspberry Pi 4 Model B (1 GB or greater) SSD CardWio WM6180 Wi-Fi HaLow mini PCIe Module WM1302 Pi Hat CAZN RJ45 ethernet port - https://s.click.aliexpress.com/e/_c3y8oRGt External Antenna 868/915 MHz 2 dBi SMA  - https://sunkworkstec.com/products/foul-weather-whip-antenna-v2 UF.L to SMA-K 1.13 mm Cable (120 mm) WaveShare 3S UPS (for 18650 batteries) 3 18650 Rechargeable Batteries14 M3 screws 4 M3 bolts10 M3 5x5 heat set threaded inserts 8 M2.5 screws 8 M2.5 5x3.5 heat set threaded inserts OverviewTogether, these components comprise a self-contained mesh node.
